subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Beloved of the world and the Goal of nations, Who hath everlastingly given and received from the right hand and from the left [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب عالم و مقصود امم را لایق و سزاست که لازال اخذ و عطا از یمین و یسار
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Imam Husayn, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
